system.effect: The character cannot take any actions. Opponents automatically hit the character with melee attacks.
system.removal: Depends on the source of the Helpless condition. If caused by another condition (such as Unconscious), removing that condition also removes Helpless.

description.value: The character is completely unable to defend themselves. They cannot take any actions, and any melee attack against them automatically hits. Ranged attacks against a Helpless target gain a +20 bonus. A Helpless character can be targeted with a Coup de Grace action.
